sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, DATE '2023-01-01'), (2, DATE '2023-12-31'), (3, DATE NULL), (4, DATE '2023-06-15');
SELECT id, weekofyear(event_date << 1) AS shifted_week FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, weekofyear(DATE '2023-02-01' + INTERVAL '1' DAY << 3) AS shifted_week_val FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, weekofyear(event_date) << 2 AS week_shifted FROM test_dates WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL);
WITH date_shift AS (SELECT id, weekofyear(event_date) AS week_num FROM test_dates) SELECT week_num, COUNT(*) FROM date_shift GROUP BY week_num HAVING week_num << 1 > 2;
CREATE TABLE additional_events (event_name TEXT, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO additional_events VALUES ('New Year', DATE '2023-01-01'), ('Mid Year', DATE '2023-06-15'), ('End Year', DATE '2023-12-31');

SELECT e.event_name, weekofyear(e.event_date) AS event_week, (1 << 4) AS bitwise_example FROM additional_events e JOIN test_dates d ON e.event_date = d.event_date WHERE d.event_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY event_week;
SELECT (weekofyear(DATE '2023-03-01') << (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_dates)) AS complex_shift FROM test_dates;
